user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a disciplinary action, so that policy deviations are formally recorded
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Disciplinary Actions screen; When I click Add disciplinary action and enter the details; Then the action is saved and appears in the Disciplinary Actions List

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter disciplinary actions by active or inactive employees and by period, so that I can review the relevant records
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Disciplinary Actions screen; When I choose Active or Inactive employees and a From and To period; Then only matching disciplinary actions are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter disciplinary actions by status and department, so that I can narrow the list to a workflow stage or team
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Disciplinary Actions screen; When I select a status such as Pending approval or Approved and a department; Then only matching records are displayed

user_story: As an approver, I want to approve, reject, or withdraw disciplinary actions pending with me, so that the process moves forward
acceptance_criteria: Given a disciplinary action has status Pending with me; When I open its Task; Then I can approve, reject, or withdraw it

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to generate a disciplinary letter, so that the recommended action is formally communicated
acceptance_criteria: Given a disciplinary action is Approved; When I generate the letter; Then the status changes to Letter generated

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search and reset the disciplinary actions list, so that I can quickly refine or clear my query
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set filter criteria; When I click Search; Then matching records are shown; And clicking Reset clears the filters
